name: Final
description:
You already know the basics of this mud. If you have some questions,
feel free to use the command 'chat' to ask something to the most
experienced players. You can also type 'help' and 'help TOPIC' to
read useful informations. Continue killing the monsters here and 
there. When you reach level 2, just say 'i am done' to begin to play
in a more advanced zone.
The Wardome Gods and Imples hope that you have a good time with us.

Grateful, someone.
